narrative:
Precinct Pulaski North (precinct in Williams County) has 1,046 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points.
